title: Recommendation
description: The output recommendation from the Tender Qualification Assistant pipeline

tender_id.description: Identifier of the tender that was analyzed

company_id.description: Identifier of the company profile used

qualification_score.description: Qualification fit score (0-100). 80+ = PASS, 60-79 = MARGINAL, <60 = FAIL

incumbent_risk.description: Incumbent retention risk score (0-100). 70+ = high risk

primary_bottleneck.description: The main reason for a REVIEW or NO_BID recommendation, using product taxonomy labels

evidence_gaps.description: List of specific evidence items missing from the company profile

confidence.description: Confidence in the recommendation (0.0-1.0). Below 0.60 indicates low confidence.

confidence_reason.description: Human-readable list of factors that drove the confidence score up or down

extraction_warnings.description: Warnings surfaced by the extractor — ambiguous clauses, missing annexures, conflicting thresholds

reasoning.description: Human-readable reasoning paragraph explaining the recommendation

failed_mandatory_requirements.description: List of mandatory requirement IDs that failed the eligibility check

pipeline_duration_seconds.description: Total time taken to produce this recommendation

created_at.description: Timestamp when this recommendation was created (ISO 8601)
